description:
A navigation bar with start/center/end parts.  These parts will be
formatted as follows:
* *Navbar.Start* content will be left-aligned at the beginning.
* *Navbar.Center* content will be visually centered in the middle.
* *Navbar.End* content will be right-aligned at the end.

props.name: children
props.description: Children to be rendered (should be Navbar.Start, Navbar.Middle, Navbar.End)

props.name: className
props.description: Optional classes to append to this div

props.name: children
props.description: Children to be rendered in the center section of the navbar

props.name: className
props.description: Optional classes to append to this div

props.name: children
props.description: Children to be rendered in the end section of the navbar

props.name: className
props.description: Optional classes to append to this div

props.name: children
props.description: Children to be rendered in the start section of the navbar

props.description: Optional classes to append to this div
